# MLIdentifier

**Protocol**

A type the Create ML framework can use as a machine learning identifier.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol MLIdentifier
```

## Overview

You can use any type that conforms to the [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLIdentifier] protocol, typically [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/Int] or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/String], to uniquely identify users and items in these [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLRecommender] methods:

- 

[doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLRecommender/recommendations(fromUsers:maxCount:restrictingToItems:excluding:excludingObserved:)-7an46]

- [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLRecommender/getSimilarItems(fromItems:maxCount:)-kq37]

## Getting an identifier

- **identifierValue**: The value of the unique identifier wrapped in a data value.

## Testing a recommender

- **recommendations(fromUsers:maxCount:restrictingToItems:excluding:excludingObserved:)**: Retrieves the highest scored item for the given array of users, based on item similarity and the rating column.
- **getSimilarItems(fromItems:maxCount:)**: Returns the top ranked similar items based on the model’s similarity type.
